title: The Secret Language of Dolphins

scenes.text: Dolphins have complex communication that resembles human language!
They use a variety of clicks and whistles to communicate and even name each other.
Studies show they can even solve problems and understand social dynamics, like humans.
Their communication is a mix of sounds, body language, and echo location!
scenes.label: MULTI-MEDIA TALK

scenes.text: Hit follow for your daily dose of wow.

description: Dolphins communicate in a way that mirrors human language! Discover their amazing social behaviors. Follow for daily facts!
